p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem CodeSystem of types for a consent v1.0.0-draft (CodeSystem)

div.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

li.a: codesystem TI Operation Outcome Details CodeSystem v1.1.1 (CodeSystem)
codesystem TIFLOW ChargeItem Operation Outcome Details CS v1.0.0-draft (CodeSystem)
codesystem TIFLOW Operation Outcome Details CS v1.0.0-draft (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Kostenträgertyp nicht PKV
The referenced prescription coverage type is not PKV and therefore not valid for ChargeItem processing
Signatur des PKV-Abgabedatensatzes ungültig
The PKV dispense dataset is missing a valid signature or contains an invalid signature
Zertifikat des PKV-Abgabedatensatzes ungültig
The certificate used for the signature of the PKV dispense dataset is invalid, expired, or revoked
ChargeItem-ID erforderlich
The operation requires a concrete ChargeItem id in the request path
ChargeItem nicht gefunden
The referenced ChargeItem resource does not exist
Zugriffsrolle nicht zulässig
The authenticated actor role is not permitted to execute this operation
Einwilligung existiert bereits
A consent for the same scope already exists and cannot be created again
Einwilligungskategorie erforderlich
The consent category is mandatory and was not provided
Einwilligungskategorie ungültig
The provided consent category is unknown or not allowed
AccessCode stimmt nicht überein
The provided access code does not match the access code assigned to the task
Task-Angabe erforderlich
A task reference is required for this operation but was not provided
Task nicht gefunden
The referenced task does not exist
Task-Secret stimmt nicht überein
The provided task secret does not match the secret stored for the task

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="1.0.0-draft"><code value="TIFLOW_SECRET_MISMATCH"><display value="Task-Secret stimmt nicht überein"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Einwilligung erforderlich
A valid consent is required to execute this operation
OCSP Abfrage fehlgeschlagen
Failed to retrieve the OCSP response for the certificate of the signature
Nachricht an sich selbst nicht zulässig
A communication message addressed to the sender itself is not permitted

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="1.0.0-draft"><code value="TIFLOW_MESSAGE_TO_SELF"><display value="Nachricht an sich selbst nicht zulässig"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Kommunikationsinhalt ungültig
The communication payload is syntactically or semantically invalid
Versicherter nicht berechtigt
The insurant does not meet the eligibility constraints for this communication flow
Empfänger ungültig
The specified recipient is invalid for the requested communication
Task-Status passt nicht
The task is in a status that does not allow execution of this operation
Task ist abgelaufen
The task cannot be processed because its redemption period has expired
MVO noch nicht gültig
The multi-prescription is not yet valid at the current point in time

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs"><version value="1.0.0-draft"><code value="TIFLOW_MVO_NOT_VALID_YET"><display value="MVO noch nicht gültig"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

title.value: TIFLOW ChargeItem Operation Outcome Details VS

display.value: Nachricht an sich selbst nicht zulässig
